case h.cons
h :
  ∀ (x : ℕ) (ps : List (Partition ℕ)),
    filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (concatMap (extendl x) ps) =
      concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl x) (filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) ps)
a : ℕ
as : List ℕ
ih :
  filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) =
    List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] as
h1 :
  ∀ (ps : List (Partition ℕ)),
    filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (concatMap (extendl a) ps) =
      concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl a) (filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) ps)
⊢ filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) =
    List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] (a :: as)

proof:
have h2 : List.filter (flip List.all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
      simp [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp] at ih ⊢
      <;>
      simp_all [h1, concatMap, List.filter, List.foldr]
      <;>
      try simp_all [List.filter, List.foldr, List.map]
      <;>
      try simp_all [List.filter, List.foldr, List.map]
      <;>
      try simp_all [List.filter, List.foldr, List.map]
      <;>
      try simp_all [List.filter, List.foldr, List.map]
      <;>
      try simp_all [List.filter, List.foldr, List.map]
    simpa [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp] using h2

have h2 : List.filter (flip List.all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
      simp [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp] at ih ⊢
      <;>
      simp_all [h1, concatMap, List.filter, List.foldr]
      <;>
      try simp_all [List.filter, List.foldr, List.map]
      <;>
      try simp_all [List.filter, List.foldr, List.map]
      <;>
      try simp_all [List.filter, List.foldr, List.map]
      <;>
      try simp_all [List.filter, List.foldr, List.map]
      <;>
      try simp_all [List.filter, List.foldr, List.map]
    simpa [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp] using h2

have h₂ : filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
      have h₃ : filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = filter (flip all ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
        simp [List.foldr]
        <;> rfl
      
      have h₄ : filter (flip all ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) = concatMap (okextendl a) (filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
        have h₅ := h a (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)
        exact h₅
      
      have h₅ : concatMap (okextendl a) (filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) = concatMap (okextendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] as) := by
        rw [ih]
        <;> rfl
      
      have h₆ : concatMap (okextendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] as) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
        simp [List.foldr]
        <;> rfl
      
      calc
        filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = filter (flip all ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by rw [h₃]
        _ = concatMap (okextendl a) (filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by rw [h₄]
        _ = concatMap (okextendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] as) := by rw [h₅]
        _ = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by rw [h₆]
    
    rw [h₂]
    <;> simp [List.foldr]
    <;> rfl

have h2 : filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = filter (flip all ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
      simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
      <;> rfl
    
    have h3 : filter (flip all ok) (concatMap (extendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) = concatMap (okextendl a) (filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
      have h4 := h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)
      simpa [Function.comp] using h4
    
    have h4 : filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = concatMap (okextendl a) (filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) := by
      rw [h2]
      rw [h3]
    
    have h5 : filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = concatMap (okextendl a) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] as) := by
      rw [h4]
      rw [ih]
      <;> simp [Function.comp]
      <;> rfl
    
    have h6 : filter (flip all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
      rw [h5]
      <;> simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
      <;> rfl
    
    rw [h6]
    <;> simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
    <;> rfl

simp_all [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp]
    <;> simp_all [concatMap, filter, flip, okextendl, extendl]
    <;> aesop

have h2 := h1
    simp [List.foldr, List.foldr] at ih ⊢
    <;>
    (try cases as <;> simp_all [List.foldr, List.map, List.filter, List.append, List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Function.comp, extendl, okextendl, ok, all, head!, flip]
      <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.filter, List.map, List.append, List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    }) <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Function.comp, extendl, okextendl, ok, all, head!, flip]
      <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.filter, List.map, List.append, List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    }) <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Function.comp, extendl, okextendl, ok, all, head!, flip]
      <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.filter, List.map, List.append, List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Function.comp, extendl, okextendl, ok, all, head!, flip]
      <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.filter, List.map, List.append, List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Function.comp, extendl, okextendl, ok, all, head!, flip]
      <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.filter, List.map, List.append, List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Function.comp, extendl, okextendl, ok, all, head!, flip]
      <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.filter, List.map, List.append, List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    })

simp_all [List.foldr, Function.comp]
    <;> simp_all [concatMap]
    <;> simp_all [List.foldr]
    <;> simp_all [filter]
    <;> try simp_all [List.map]
    <;> try simp_all [List.append]
    <;> try simp_all [List.cons]
    <;> try simp_all [List.nil]
    <;> try simp_all [List.foldr]
    <;> try simp_all [Function.comp]

have h2 : filter (flip List.all ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) = List.foldr (concatMap ∘ okextendl) [[]] (a :: as) := by
      simp_all [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [filter, concatMap, okextendl]) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.map, List.append, List.foldr]) <;>
      (try simp_all [flip, ok, List.all, List.all?, List.mem_cons, List.mem_singleton]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [extendl, glue, cons, concatMap, List.map, List.append, List.foldr]) <;>
      (try simp_all [List.all, List.all?, List.mem_cons, List.mem_singleton]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try omega)
    rw [h2]

simp_all [List.foldr, List.filter, List.foldr]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [concatMap, Function.comp, flip]) <;>
    (try simp_all [List.foldr, List.filter, List.foldr]) <;>
    (try simp_all [okextendl, extendl, Partition.cons, Partition.all_cons, List.all_cons, List.head!, List.tail]) <;>
    (try simp_all [List.foldr, List.filter, List.foldr, concatMap, Function.comp, flip]) <;>
    (try simp_all [okextendl, extendl, Partition.cons, Partition.all_cons, List.all_cons, List.head!, List.tail]) <;>
    (try
      {
        have h2 := h a
        simp_all [concatMap, Function.comp, flip]
        <;>
        try simp_all [List.foldr, List.filter, List.foldr]
        <;>
        try simp_all [okextendl, extendl, Partition.cons, Partition.all_cons, List.all_cons, List.head!, List.tail]
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [List.foldr, List.filter, List.foldr]
        <;>
        try simp_all [concatMap, Function.comp, flip]
        <;>
        try simp_all [okextendl, extendl, Partition.cons, Partition.all_cons, List.all_cons, List.head!, List.tail]
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [List.foldr, List.filter, List.foldr, concatMap, Function.comp, flip]
        <;>
        try simp_all [okextendl, extendl, Partition.cons, Partition.all_cons, List.all_cons, List.head!, List.tail]
        <;>
        try simp_all [List.foldr, List.filter, List.foldr]
      })

simp_all [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        have h2 := h1 []
        have h3 := h1 [[]]
        simp [List.filter, List.map, List.foldr, concatMap, glue, List.append] at h2 h3 ⊢
        <;>
        simp_all [List.filter, List.map, List.foldr, concatMap, glue, List.append]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [List.filter, List.map, List.foldr, concatMap, glue, List.append]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [List.filter, List.map, List.foldr, concatMap, glue, List.append]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [List.filter, List.map, List.foldr, concatMap, glue, List.append]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
